title: senecio canalipes
intro: Senecio canalipes, also known as the Desert Marigold or False Senecio, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is a perennial shrub with clusters of yellow and orange flowers that have been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senecio canalipes include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and aiding in digestion, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Senecio canalipes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
